title: Wohnungsfinder
description_html: Berlin apartment listings (detail-enriched) plus the filter / score history.

passed_by_score.title: Passed listings, best score first
passed_by_score.sql: SELECT f.priority, f.score, l.total_rent, l.cold_rent, l.rooms, l.size_m2, l.district, l.wbs, l.energy_class, l.heating_type, l.address, l.url FROM listings l JOIN filter_results f ON f.url = l.url WHERE f.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM filter_results WHERE url = l.url) AND f.passed = 1 ORDER BY f.score DESC, l.total_rent ASC

cheapest_passed.title: Cheapest passed listings
cheapest_passed.sql: SELECT l.total_rent, l.cold_rent, l.rooms, l.size_m2, l.district, l.wbs, l.address, l.url FROM listings l JOIN filter_results f ON f.url = l.url WHERE f.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM filter_results WHERE url = l.url) AND f.passed = 1 ORDER BY l.total_rent ASC

by_district.title: Stats by district
by_district.sql: SELECT district, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(total_rent)) AS avg_total_rent, MIN(total_rent) AS min_total_rent, ROUND(AVG(size_m2)) AS avg_m2 FROM listings WHERE total_rent IS NOT NULL GROUP BY district ORDER BY n DESC

block_reasons.title: Why listings were blocked
block_reasons.sql: SELECT block_reason, COUNT(*) AS n FROM filter_results WHERE passed = 0 AND block_reason IS NOT NULL GROUP BY block_reason ORDER BY n DESC

wbs_breakdown.title: WBS requirement breakdown
wbs_breakdown.sql: SELECT wbs, COUNT(*) AS n FROM listings GROUP BY wbs ORDER BY n DESC

energy_breakdown.title: Energy class breakdown
energy_breakdown.sql: SELECT energy_class, COUNT(*) AS n FROM listings WHERE energy_class IS NOT NULL GROUP BY energy_class ORDER BY energy_class

enrichment_coverage.title: How many listings have been detail-enriched
enrichment_coverage.sql: SELECT SUM(detail_fetched_at IS NOT NULL) AS enriched, SUM(detail_fetched_at IS NULL) AS pending_or_skipped, COUNT(*) AS total FROM listings
